signals.headline: Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse Confirms XRP Can Flip Ethereum in Market Cap | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse Confirms XRP Can Flip Ethereum in Market Cap | YES | MED confidence**  
Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse stated Tuesday that XRP has a realistic chance to overtake Ethereum's $286.58B market cap (currently #2) from its $84.16B (#4), citing superior cross-border payment utility, faster/cheaper transactions, and $1.3B in early-2026 real-world asset tokenization on XRP Ledger
